category_title: Students exhibiting physical aggression, bullying, and disrespect toward authority
minimal_context: The students are supposed to be completing an English assignment at their desks.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Please sit at your desks and begin the English assignment.

STUDENT: I am not doing this. I can't work because he is bothering me again.

TUTOR: Try to ignore him and just focus on your own work.

STUDENT: (Yelling across the desks) Shut up! You are always insulting me!

TUTOR: Everyone needs to calm down and be quiet right now.

STUDENT: (Lunges at the other student) I said shut up! (The students get into a physical fight, knocking over seats and creating complete chaos in the classroom)

options.A: Respond with enthusiastic praise, expressing pride in the student for their continued progress.
options.B: Provide the student with the option to take micro-breaks from the English assignment.
options.C: Prompt the student to reflect on what just happened during the English assignment.
options.D: Joke with the student and laugh at oneself to defuse the classroom situation.
